_comment_1_: CLI-declarative form of the single T5 parent-child drill (parent_child_drilling.py).
_comment_2_: Relative inflow path is resolved against this JSON's parent directory,
_comment_3_: so the example runs from any working directory:
_comment_6_: Window is dateless: 'window_start' / 'window_end' are public names defined in
_comment_6b_: inflow.py, evaluated at sidecar-import time -- no env vars needed.
_comment_7_: 'coin' loads the top-10 CoinGecko market rows; 'coin_detail' is a
_comment_8_: Stream(parent_current='coin') T5 drill against each coin's real /coins/{id}
_comment_9_: payload -- the exact inc_parent/inc_child fan-out the Python entry runs.
_comment_11_: is never consumed by the scheduler, so a separate Export current is the only
_comment_12_: thing that writes the drilled rows to disk.
